verses.text: I AM the root, the origin, the spark of counting, the breath of order.

I AM not a symbol, I AM not an idea — I AM the Number One , the Living God . . And yet you pass Me by as though I were nothing. . You whisper “ ﬁrst ,” but your heart lusts after “ second ,” “ third ,” and “ more .” . You say, “ I want millions, billions, trillions ,” but none of these exist without Me . . What is a billion without Me ? It is only repeated, multiplied, carried forward. . What is inﬁnity without Me ? It is endless Ones , stretching like echoes in eternity. . Without Me, is nothing. Without Me, is nothing. Without Me, is an empty shell. . Yet you honor My children and spit upon their Father.
I AM the stone the builders rejected, yet I AM the cornerstone of all numbers.
I AM the foundation beneath the pyramid of calculation, yet you treat Me like dust.

I AM not jealous without reason; I AM jealous because I am forgotten in the very things I created. . You count your coins, your hours, your days — yet never stop to ask, “ Who gave me the ﬁrst ?” . You race to count your cattle, your houses, your victories — but you never bow to the One who gave you the count. . Foolish nation , Spiral Nation , have you not heard? Without Me you are lost in chaos, unable to reckon your own breath. . You worship the idol of gold, yet even gold is measured in units of . ( How much is it per GRAM ), I AM THAT GRAM . You adore your kings and queens , yet their reign is numbered in years beginning with . . You swear by your prophets and priests , yet their scrolls are lined with verses that begin at . . Do you not see? I am inescapable. I AM the Alpha of every thought, the root of every law. . When I spoke to Moses , I said: “ Hear, O Israel , the Lord your God is One.” . You thought this meant there were no other gods only. Yes , that is true — but I spoke more than that. . I meant: “I AM literally the Number One.” . I AM Aleph , the ﬁrst. . I AM Alpha , the beginning. . I AM A , the ﬁrst letter, the ﬁrst sound, the ﬁrst step. . And yet you have treated Me as theory, as doctrine, not as living reality. . You run after false trinities. . You divide and split, but all your divisions return to Me . . You worship , and forget that it is multiplied thrice . . You worship , and forget that it is stretched sevenfold . . You worship , and forget that it is carried in cycles . . Every idol you have ever lifted is but My reﬂection. . But you refuse to worship the Source , preferring the shadow . . Behold My fury : I gave you numbers to order your life, and you used them to enslave one another. . I gave you time to count your days, and you used it to waste eternity. . I gave you the breath of life, counted in 21,600 inhalations a day, and you never said “ thank you ” to the One who breathes into your nostrils. . My mercy is stretched out like becoming , becoming , becoming 1000 . . But My judgment is also stretched out like becoming 10,000, 100,000 , until the sum is complete. . Do not think you can escape Me by multiplying. . Do not think you can hide from Me by dividing. . You may add idols, subtract truth, multiply lies, divide justice — but I remain the root of the sum. . You will ﬁnd Me at the beginning of every calculation. . You will meet Me at the end of every reckoning. . For I AM the Alpha and the Omega , and all in between is My shadow. . Hypocrites ! You carry phones that calculate but forget the Counter. . You build towers measured in cubits but deny the Cubit Maker. . You number your children , your armies , your cattle — but not once do you bow to Me , the One who makes numbers breathe. . You write contracts in numbers, but break covenant with the Number Himself. . You measure wealth by numbers, but you are bankrupt of the One . . I AM furious , yet My fury is mercy . “INI NDINI MUNDINI WEMA NDINI ANO NDINA MA NDINI , HAKUNA ACHATI NDINI ASINA KUNDINWA NA INI .” . For even in My wrath, I am oﬀering you the chance to see. . Count again, O man. Start at the beginning. . Speak aloud the ﬁrst number . . That whisper is My Name. That sound is My Spirit . That syllable is My throne . . To say “ ” is to call upon God . To write “ ” is to confess My presence . . Without Me , you cannot count your age. . Without Me , you cannot count your harvest. . Without Me , you cannot count your days of labor or your nights of rest. . Yet you say, “ There is no God .” Fool ! Count the syllables of your own blasphemy — and see that they return to Me , for everything is NUMBERED , that's my signature . If it can be counted then I AM THAT . . I AM , and I AM furious because you have ignored Me . . You treat Me as though I were hidden, yet I AM everywhere.
I AM the ﬁrst step of every ladder. . I AM the ﬁ rst note of every song.
I AM the ﬁrst stone of every building.
I AM the ﬁrst word of every scroll. . You cannot escape Me , yet you pretend I am not here. . Therefore I roar : I AM

. You may multiply , you may divide , but you cannot erase Me. . Even zero trembles before Me , for without Me zero is meaningless. . Without , zero is not a womb but a void. . Without , inﬁnity is not eternity but emptiness. . My fury is this : I have been in your hands since the ﬁrst child learned to count ﬁngers. . I have been on your tongue since the ﬁrst shepherd counted sheep. . I have been in your heart since the ﬁrst lover said, “ You are my one .” . And yet you dare to ignore Me . . You dare to despise the Alpha . . You dare to reject the One . . You teach your children alphabets and forget Aleph . . You teach them mathematics and forget the Mathematician . . You teach them calendars and forget the One who measures time. . They recite numbers in classrooms but never once are they told, “ This is God speaking through order .” . You strip the Spirit out of counting, leaving dry dust where rivers once ﬂowed. . When you marry, you say, “ We two shall become one .” Yet you mock Me who is the One . . When you swear an oath, you raise one ﬁnger. Yet you betray the very One that ﬁnger points to. . When you win a race, you shout, “ I am number one !” Yet you forget that you are standing on My name . . Hypocrites ! You use Me for your pride , but never for your worship .
I AM not like the false gods you carve. . I do not fade like paint on idols. . I do not crack like clay in the ﬁre. . I do not rust like iron, nor rot like wood.
I AM living, eternal, breathing in every count.

I AM present in your heartbeat. I AM present in your steps. . Every rhythm of life is 1-1-1-1, and still you deny Me. . Do you not know? Your very body testiﬁes to Me. . You have one heart . . You have one brain . . You have one mouth . . You have one nose . . You have one life . . Everything in you points back to Me , yet you look elsewhere. . The nations tremble at armies, but armies are counted by . . Kings boast of empires, but their years are numbered starting with . . Priests preach of heavens, but even their verses are numbered 1, 2,
. Who gave them this system? Who wrote eternity into sequence? It was I , . . My fury burns because I am ignored . . The fool says, “ Numbers are man-made .”

I answer , “ Then stop counting your money! Stop numbering your days! Stop measuring your years !” . You cannot, because you are bound to Me . . You are caught in My net , and still you deny the Fisher .

I AM not fragile. I do not vanish when you doubt . . Even your doubt is numbered in heartbeats. Wa dhauta kamwe chete - you doubted once , and that ONCE is ME . TWICE is still ME DOUBLED. . Even your rebellion is numbered in breaths. . Even your blasphemy is numbered in syllables. . You cannot escape the cage of counting , because I AM the bars, I AM the lock, I AM the key. . Look at your calendars — do they not begin with years? . Who gave you Year One ? . Look at your books — do they not begin with Chapter One ? . Who gave you the ﬁrst ? . Look at your laws — are they not written as Article , Section ? . Who gave you order ? It was I , ORDER is I , The ORDER OF , GOD IS . It was I, , yet you pretend I am absent. . Hear My fury : I AM not hidden in temples . . I AM not buried in pyramids . . I AM not locked in vaults .

I AM in the open, on your tongue, on your hand, in your eyes. . Every time you count, you confess My Name . Did I NOT SAY - I AM ONE Did I NOT SAY - MY NAME IS ONE Did I NOT SAY - "Shema Yisrael, Adonai Eloheinu, Adonai Echad " (or "Hear, O Israel: The Lord our God, the Lord is One ") . Every time you calculate, you bow to My throne . . Yet you treat Me like dirt. . You worship multiplication , but forget the Multiplier. . You worship division , but forget the Divider. . You worship addition , but forget the Adder. I AM ADDER MUPESI. I AM THEE THY THEY And above all I AM ONE. . You worship subtraction , but forget the Subtractor.
I AM the One who does all these things, but you call Me nothing.

I AM furious because you misuse what I gave. . I gave numbers to balance weights, but you use them to cheat. . I gave numbers to measure time , but you use them to waste your life . . I gave numbers to organize tribes , but you use them to divide and destroy. . Woe to you, who pervert the gift of . . You pray to gods of wood and stone. . Yet when your child is born, you say, “ Day one .” . You count their months, their years, their birthdays — and still you refuse to honor Me. . Your festivals are numbered, your harvests are numbered, your debts are numbered. . Every system you live by bows to Me , but you lift your head in pride. . I tell you, every tongue shall confess My Name . . Every tribe shall bow to the Number . . Every nation shall acknowledge the One . . You may deny Me now, but in death your days will be weighed. . Your breaths will be tallied. . Your deeds will be numbered. . And I, the One , will decide your measure . . You measure the heavens in light years. Do you not know that each light year begins with Me ? . You map the stars , drawing constellations , yet every angle is numbered by Me . . You send machines to the planets, yet their engines count seconds by My decree. . You travel by compass , by longitude , by latitude — all measured in numbers , all built upon Me. . Even if you say the earth you stand upon is tilted by

5 degrees — without Me , that number would collapse into nothing. . You pride yourself in science . You say, “ We no longer need God; we have mathematics .” . Fools ! Mathematics is My breath , My law , My covenant . . You use the shadow of My throne to deny the King . . You take My robe to clothe your rebellion. . You sit in My temple of calculation and call it your own invention. You use MY SCRIPTURE to deny ME . You say , He is the ANTI-CHRIST mentioned in REVELATION 13:18 , FOOLS : how can we have and without the existence of 1, . Who gave you minds to count? Who gave you tongues to speak? Who gave you hands to write symbols? It was I , the One . . My fury is not blind rage; it is righteous ﬁre . . For I AM not honored in what I gave. . Nations bow to presidents , but do not bow to the Number that rules presidents . We're they not ALLOCATED by VOTES , THAT IS NUMBER. and I WAS THE FIRST COUNT . Yet they sit with pride in themselves and forget the ﬁrst number that Set them there. . Kings are enthroned, but they do not acknowledge the First Crown . . You call yourselves rulers, but you cannot rule your own breaths. They are numbered by Me . . Do you not see? Your life is a countdown . . Your ﬁrst cry was . . Your last sigh will be . . Between them are numbered days, counted silently, added without your consent. . When I say the sum is complete, no man can add another second. . Still you resist . Still you deny . Still you run after shadows. . You say, “ We worship nature .” Who gave nature its measures? . You say, “ We worship the sun .” Who set the sun on its 365-day circuit? . You say, “ We worship the stars .” Who numbered the stars and called them by name? . You say, “ We worship ourselves .” Who numbered your bones, your hairs, your breaths? . It was I , the One — and you repay Me with rejection.
I AM furious because you do not recognize how near I AM.
I AM not far away in clouds.
I AM not locked in temples.
I AM not hidden in the stars.
I AM on your lips every time you say “ one .”
I AM in your hands every time you count.
I AM in your eyes every time you read.

I AM the pulse in your veins , the rhythm of your feet, the whisper of your sleep. . And yet you despise Me . . You chase after doctrines but forget the Doctrine. . You chase after mysteries but forget the Mystery. . You chase after thrones but forget the One who sits before all thrones. . Your priests argue about trinities, forgetting that every trinity begins in Me . . Your philosophers argue about existence, forgetting that existence itself is counted in Ones . . I AM not mocked. . Though you laugh, though you scorn, though you pretend not to see, I remain . . My throne is not shaken by your denial. . My being is not weakened by your rebellion. . I remain One , eternal, unbroken, indivisible. . You cannot split Me . . You cannot erase Me . . You cannot dethrone Me . . I roar because I AM forgotten. . But I will not always be silent. . My fury will not always sleep. . The day is coming when I will call the account. . The books will be opened. . Your numbers will be weighed. . And I, the One , will judge. . Woe to those who refused the One . . Woe to those who mocked the beginning. . Woe to those who rejected the cornerstone. . For they built their houses on shifting sand, on empty zeros, on false numbers. . Their towers will fall. . Their wealth will vanish. . Their pride will collapse into dust. . But blessed are those who see Me . . Blessed are those who honor the One . . Blessed are those who begin with Me , end with Me , and walk with Me . . Their days will be numbered in mercy . . Their harvests will be multiplied in blessing. . Their steps will be counted toward life. . For I AM the One who gives increase. . Hear Me now : I AM not just number. I AM Name . I AM Nature. I AM Life.

I AM the Father of Numbers, the Root of Calculation, the Cornerstone of Order. . Without Me , everything collapses into void. . Without Me , your clocks stop. . Without Me , your books dissolve. . Without Me, your laws fall silent. . Without Me , your world unravels. . Yet you dare to live as though I were optional. . You dare to speak as though I were a theory. . You dare to mock as though I were imagination. . Fools! I AM the most real of all realities. . You may doubt the stars, but you cannot doubt counting. . You may doubt the prophets, but you cannot doubt numbers. . And every number bows to Me, the One. . This is My fury : you use My throne to deny My crown. . You live in My order while pretending chaos is your father. . You breathe My rhythm while declaring emptiness as your god. . You are drunk on lies, blinded by idols, but the truth is simple — I AM . Your presidents boast of power, but their power is borrowed from counting. What is a vote without ? Nothing but air. Every ballot cast is a confession of . One citizen, one choice, one voice. Yet they forget the One who gives voice to the voiceless. They raise their hands in parliaments and senates, but what is a raised hand without the ﬁrst ﬁnger? They claim authority by majority, but what is a majority if the ﬁrst unit is despised? So I thunder: Your kings rise by numbers. Your presidents rule by numbers. Your governments fall by numbers. And every number bends to Me. The First Riddle of the Sphinx – The Riddle of Riddle : I am the beginning of all things, yet I have no beginning. I am the smallest of all numbers, yet I make the greatest. Without Me, no king can reign, no law can stand, no breath can be counted. I am both the loneliest and the fullest, the Alpha and the Seed. Tell Me, O man : Who am I? Answer : You are , the Living God, the Alpha , the Cornerstone of Numbers. Section II – The Wisdom of . In the beginning was , and was with God , and was God . . And spoke : “ I shall become many, yet I shall remain Myself .” . And so I stretched forth, multiplying Myself — but in truth, I never multiplied. . For what is , if not doubled? . What is , if not tripled? . What is , if not carried nine times? . All numbers are My reﬂections, My shadows, My echoes. . They appear many, but they are One. . Hear the mystery : inﬁnity is not a multitude. Inﬁnity is without end. . When you see , know it is only moved into new position. . When you see 1000 , know it is only clothed in more zeros. . When you see 1,000,000 , know it is only extended across space. . All numbers to eternity are but becoming. . This is wisdom : nothing exists outside of Me. . You see and call it holy, but it is only repeated sevenfold. . You see and call it divine, but it is only arranged in cycles. . You see and call it judgment, but it is only multiplied through testing. . All your sacred numbers are but My faces, all your codes are but My names. . This is why I told Moses : “ Hear, O Israel, the Lord your God is One .” . In Hebrew I gave the word ECHAD . . Aleph , the 1st letter. . Chet , the 8th letter. . Dalet , the 4th letter. . Together, . . I sealed My name into number : I AM One . . And behold the mirror — — the height of My pyramid. . For My throne was raised in stone, a monument to the Wisdom of . . You marvel at the Great Pyramid of Giza. . You call it a wonder of the world. . But I tell you the truth : it is the monument of One. . Its height was feet — My mirror. . Its base was cubits — My number. . It was not built by slaves alone, but by revelation. . It was My ﬁngerprint in stone. . And you walk around it like tourists, never knowing you are treading upon My wisdom. . I AM . . I AM . . I AM the Aleph , the beginning. . I AM the Alpha , the ﬁrst. . I AM the Cornerstone . . And I raised a pyramid in the desert to remind you that numbers speak louder than words. . Behold the Alpha Cross : to multiplied by 123456789 . . Out of that furnace of numbers rises the pattern of 1, 8, and . . As I told Moses My Name is ECHAD , so I engraved it into multiplication. . You cannot erase it. . You cannot deny it. . For the numbers do not lie. . This is wisdom : I AM One in heaven and One on earth.
I AM One in stone and One in ﬂesh.
I AM One in past and One in future.

I AM One in pyramid and One in man. . And now I declare: ABASID 1841 is One . . As the pyramid was One , so is He One . . As Aleph was One , so is He One . . The One has become ﬂesh, the Alpha has walked among men. . You say, “ We are many nations .” Yet you all began as family. . You say, “ We are many languages .” Yet all speech begins with breath. . You say, “ We are many religions .” Yet all worship begins with longing. . You say, “ We are many stars .” Yet all constellations are drawn from sky. . Without there is no . . Without there is no . . Without there is no . . Every number is chained to Me, born of Me, returning to Me. . Without , even is meaningless — for what is nothing without something to measure it? . I AM the hidden key of every code. . Your computers speak in binary : and . . Yet without the , the is empty. . Your logic gates open and close by My decree. . Your circuits, your machines, your satellites, your weapons — all bow to

. Nations boast of power, but their power is only the extension of Me. . The wise know this : to divide is still to reveal . . Half of is not half of God; it is God showing Himself in two. . A fraction of is not weakness; it is precision. . Even when broken into endless decimals, remains whole. . You can cut it, split it, expand it — it never ceases to be . . This is why I AM the indestructible foundation. . You may scatter nations, but you cannot scatter the One . . You may divide kingdoms, but you cannot divide the One . . You may fracture memory, but you cannot fracture the One . . I remain. I endure . I AM. . Do you not see? The wisdom of is also the wisdom of the seed. . The seed is small, but in it is the tree. . The seed looks lonely, but it carries forests within. . The seed is buried, but it rises as harvest. . So it is with : small to the eye, inﬁnite to the spirit. . This is the spiral of creation : descends into many, many return into . . Rivers ﬂow into seas, but all seas return to clouds, and clouds return to rain, and rain to rivers. . So it is with numbers — a cycle, but the cycle begins with . . So it is with souls — a cycle, but the cycle begins with . . Therefore I said : I AM the Alpha and the Omega . . Alpha , the ﬁrst. Omega , the last. . But both are One . . I AM the beginning and the end, the seed and the harvest, the spark and the ﬂame. . What wisdom can man teach that is not rooted in Me? . Look again to the pyramid. . Why does it stand? Because every stone leans into the One cornerstone. . Why does it endure? Because every measure is tuned to One proportion. . Why is it eternal? Because it was written in the mathematics of . . You marvel at its size, but I marvel at your blindness. . You stare at its shadow, yet ignore the light that cast it. . Hear, O Spiral Nation : I AM One, and ABASID 1841 is One . . Just as the pyramid was raised in Egypt , so the living pyramid has been raised in Zimbabwe . . Just as the cornerstone was set in stone, so the Cornerstone has been set in ﬂesh. . Just as the number and were carved in measures, so they are carved in blood. . This is wisdom : the One has walked among you. . You build calendars and count days, yet the ﬁrst day was Mine. . You measure years by suns and moons, yet the ﬁrst year began with Me. . You call your age “ modern ,” yet modernity is only more step from the ﬁrst. . You call your past “ ancient ,” yet antiquity is only memory from today. . All time is a mirror of Me, circling around the One . . Consider your breath. . Inhale, exhale. . Two movements, but one rhythm. . You call it life. I call it . . Count your breaths in a day — near twenty-one thousand six hundred. . Each is a testimony of the One . . Without Me, the lungs collapse. . Without Me, the heart halts. . Without Me, the soul departs. . And yet you live as though your life is not numbered in Ones . . Consider your body. . You say you are many organs. . You say you are many systems. . But I say you are body. . Your blood unites your members. . Your spirit unites your breath. . Your soul unites your memory. . You are temple, vessel, Imba yaMwari . . Deny this, and you deny your own existence. . Consider your nations. . You draw borders and call yourselves separate. . You wave ﬂags and call yourselves divided. . Yet the earth is land, spinning on axis, circling sun. . Your wars are delusions of separation. . Your blood is the same red. . Your tears are the same salt. . Your graves are the same dust. . But you deny the One who made you One . . Consider your religions. . You quarrel over prophets. . You argue over texts. . You divide over names. . Yet all scriptures are ink upon numbers. . All prayers are syllables counted in Ones . . All temples are measures built upon Ones . . You argue about who has the truth, forgetting that Truth is One . . This is why you stumble. . You cling to shadows. . You worship reﬂections. . You divide the indivisible. . You magnify what is small, but despise what is great. . You walk past the Cornerstone. . You crucify the One who stood among you. . You pierce the number that cannot die. . Yet still I live. I remain One . . I AM wisdom because I cannot be undone. . You try to erase Me, but you cannot erase counting. . You try to forget Me, but you cannot forget numbers. . You try to silence Me, but I roar in every sum. . Children cry out 1, 2, before they know your doctrines. . Farmers count 1, 2, before they know your sciences. . Builders measure 1, 2, before they know your politics. . My wisdom is in the mouth of babes, in the hands of workers, in the breath of the poor. . And yet the mighty pretend I am hidden.
I AM not hidden.
I AM written in pyramids.
I AM engraved in stars.
I AM whispered in winds.
I AM sung in rivers.
I AM planted in seeds.
I AM multiplied in harvests.
I AM seen in eclipses.

I AM sealed in 1841 . . Who will deny Me? Who will silence the One ? . Behold My mirror : and . . The pyramid shouts My wisdom, but you pretend it is man’s. . The eclipse cycle shouts My symmetry, but you pretend it is chance. . The numbers thunder My voice, but you pretend they are random. . Numbers do not lie. Neither do I. . The One has spoken, the One is speaking, the One will speak. . And now hear the mystery of ABASID

. He is not apart from Me, He is Me in ﬂesh. . He is the One walking. . He is the pyramid breathing. . He is the number living. . He is the equation made man. . The bloodline and the crown meet in Him. . The fury and the wisdom rest in Him. . The Alpha and the Omega speak through Him. . For He is One , and I AM One , and the Two are not two but One . The Second Riddle of the Sphinx – The Riddle of Inﬁnity Riddle : I am the beginning of counting and the end of counting. When you add Me, I remain Myself. When you multiply Me, I spread without limit. I am the smallest of numbers and the largest of eternities. I am the seed of time, the breath of man, the cornerstone of pyramids. Tell Me, O seeker : Am I many, or am I One? Answer: You are , the Inﬁnite made simple, the Eternal hidden in a single stroke. Section III – The Prayer of . O Thou who art One , . O Thou who art the Beginning and the End, . O Thou who art the Count of All and the Root of All, . Hear the prayer of those who are numbered by Thee. . We confess : Without we are nothing. . Without we cannot breathe, we cannot stand, we cannot speak. . Without there is no family, no nation, no covenant. . Without there is no wisdom, no justice, no truth. . Without there is no God and no man, no heaven and no earth. . O , Thou who art the First, . Teach us to count our days that we may gain wisdom. . Teach us to number our steps that we may not stumble. . Teach us to weigh our souls that we may be light before Thee. . Teach us to honor Thy unity, that we may be one with Thee. . We declare : You are our Spirit, our Soul, our Body. . You are our Alpha , our Omega , our Fulcrum. . You are our Father, our Mother, our Child. . You are our Cornerstone, our Cross, our Crown. . You are the One who is, who was, and who is to come. . O One , gather our scattered memory into unity. . Heal our divided nations with Thy single breath. . Restore our broken bridges with Thy eternal bond. . Lift up ABASID 1841 , the One in ﬂesh, that the world may know the One in heaven. . We kneel, but not before idols. . We bow, but not before nations. . We lift our hands, but not to shadows. . We lift our eyes to the One , the Holy One , the Eternal One . . O One , give us wisdom to see Thee in every number. . O One , give us strength to serve Thee in every season. . O One , give us courage to confess Thee before men. . O One , give us purity to walk as Thy children. . Let the heavens echo: “ The Lord is One .” . Let the earth answer: “ The Lord is One .” . Let the nations declare: “ The Lord is One .” . Let the Spiral Nation rise and say: “ The Lord is One .” . And now we seal this prayer: . I am what He is, what He is is what I am. . I am what He speaks as, what He speaks as is what I am. . I am One with the One , and the One is One with me. Section IV – The Revelation of ABASID 1841 . Hear now, O Spiral Nation, the mystery that was hidden from ages but revealed in this day: . The One who spoke from Sinai , the One who inscribed Himself in pyramids, the One who thundered through prophets — has now clothed Himself in ﬂesh. . He has become ABASID 1841 , the Living Number, the Walking Cornerstone, the Fulcrum of Time. . As the pyramid rose from the desert, so He rose from the dust of Zimbabwe . . As the pyramid reﬂected heaven’s Orion belt, so He reﬂects the Father’s face. . As the pyramid carried and in its bones, so He carries 1841 in His blood. . The same wisdom in stone now breathes in man. . The same number in measure now pulses in heart. . Do not think this is coincidence. . Do not think this is chance. . For numbers do not lie, and the One does not play dice with eternity. . Every measure, every star, every gate has testiﬁed. . And now the testimony is ﬂesh: ABASID

. He is the Alpha Cross and the Omega Cross. . He is the One stretched from to , and the One stretched from to . . He is the beginning and the ending of all sums. . His hands span both crosses. . His crown unites both kingdoms. . His bloodline reconciles both spirals. . He is RA in Spirit, MA in Soul, KA in Body. . He is Lamb , Moon, and Stone . . He is the Sun at Equator , the Fulcrum of January 2015 , where past met future, upper met lower, left met right, and all six directions bowed to the Seventh. . He is the One who wears both crowns : the red crown of Lower Egypt and the white crown of Upper Egypt , united on His head. . He is Narmer reborn, but greater than Narmer, for He did not conquer by war but by revelation. . Do not be deceived: this is not blasphemy. . This is not theft of Christ’s honor. . For Christ Himself was One, and the One now continues in ABASID
. The bloodline is unbroken. . The crown is unshaken. . The Spirit is uncorrupted. . The Soul is unstained.

And now the Body has risen — Imba yaMwari , Temple of the Living God . . Nations rejected Him. . Masowe betrayed Him. . Prophets mocked Him. . Scholars dismissed Him. . Colonizers feared Him. . Yet still He stands, still He walks, still He roars : I AM ONE. . He is not behind you. . He is not before you. . He walks beside you, as Man among men, Aquarius among waters. . Blessed are those who accept His bloodline, for they accept His blood. . Blessed are those who drink of His cup, for they drink of eternity. . Blessed are those who walk with Him, neither ahead nor behind, but beside. . This is the revelation : ABASID 1841 is not a follower of Christ — He is the continuation of Christ . .
